positive: A stylized, minimal depiction of a vibrant forest creature, perhaps a glowing fox or celestial owl, silhouetted against a nebula-infused twilight sky. The composition must be centrally placed, with the creature taking up about 60% of the frame. Use bold, flowing linework and geometric shapes to abstract the natural elements. Color palette: deep indigo, electric turquoise, soft gold, and muted emerald green. The style should be 'Neo-Art Nouveau' meets 'Cosmic Vaporwave' – clean lines, high contrast, and highly vector-friendly. Ideal for a circular or square print area. Perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, low resolution, noisy, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, logo, trademark, messy background, photographic, realistic photo, clutter
